name: Stateful Guardrails for Multi-Turn LLM Systems: A Conversational Risk Accumulation Framework
summary: arXiv:2607.19361v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Most safety guardrails for large language models (LLMs) evaluate each prompt-response pair in isolation, which misses failures that arise only over...
description: arXiv:2607.19361v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Most safety guardrails for large language models (LLMs) evaluate each prompt-response pair in isolation, which misses failures that arise only over a dialogue as benign turns compose into harm. We term this Conversational Risk Accumulation (CRA): gradual intent drift, fragmented assembly of prohibited instructions, and sensitivity build-up from...
author: Sanjay Mishra, Divya Chukkapalli, Ganesh R. Naik
